mapper.sql: pgr.id, pgr.permission_group_id, pgr.resource_id, pgr.resource_type, pgr.permission_type, pgr.create_by, pgr.create_time, pgr.update_by, pgr.update_time
mapper.select: SELECT pgr.resource_id AS resourceId, pgr.resource_type AS resourceType, pgr.permission_type AS permissionType FROM permission_group_resources pgr WHERE pgr.permission_group_id = #{permissionGroupId} ORDER BY pgr.resource_id
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO permission_group_resources (id, permission_group_id, resource_id, resource_type, permission_type, create_by, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.permissionGroupId}, #{item.resourceId}, #{item.resourceType}, #{item.permissionType}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT pg.id AS permissionGroupId, pg.group_code AS groupCode, pg.group_name AS groupName, pg.description AS groupDesc, pg.status AS status, pgr.resource_id AS resourceId, pgr.resource_type AS resourceType, pgr.permission_type AS permissionType, pgr.create_by AS createBy, u.user_name AS createByName, pgr.create_time AS createTime, pgr.update_by AS updateBy, u2.user_name AS updateByName, pgr.update_time AS updateTime FROM permission_group_resources pgr LEFT JOIN permission_groups pg ON pgr.permission_group_id = pg.id LEFT JOIN po_users u ON pgr.create_by = u.user_id LEFT JOIN po_users u2 ON pgr.update_by = u2.user_id WHERE pgr.resource_id = #{resourceId} ORDER BY pg.id
